name: EZZ Life Science Holdings Limited
summary: EZZ Life Science Holdings Limited provides skin care and consumer health products to retailers and consumers in Australia and internationally. It is involved in the wholesale distribution of EAORON branded skin care products to pharmacies, supermarkets, and specialist retailers, as well as to other grocery retailers and on-line retailers. The company also develops, produces, and distributes a range of consumer health products under the EZZ brand to retailers and consumers through online and offline channels. EZZ Life Science Holdings Limited was founded in 2018 and is headquartered in Silver Water, Australia.
